name: @voivox/desktop
description: Voice Vac local-first, silent audio-to-text workstation for macOS.
author: Voice Vac contributors

scripts.build: vite build && esbuild electron/main.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node22 --format=esm --external:electron --outfile=dist/electron/main.js && esbuild electron/preload.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node22 --format=cjs --external:electron --outfile=dist/electron/preload.js && npm run build --workspace=@voivox/mcp && node ../../scripts/prepare-desktop-resources.mjs && cp ../../native/asr/qwen_runtime.py ../../native/asr/voivox_asr_worker.py ../../apps/mcp/dist/index.js ../../THIRD_PARTY_NOTICES.md dist/resources/ && cp ../../LICENSE dist/resources/VACVOX_LICENSE.txt && cp ../../node_modules/@modelcontextprotocol/sdk/LICENSE dist/resources/MCP_SDK_LICENSE.txt && cp ../../node_modules/zod/LICENSE dist/resources/ZOD_LICENSE.txt && cp ../../node_modules/zod-to-json-schema/LICENSE dist/resources/ZOD_TO_JSON_SCHEMA_LICENSE.txt && cp ../../node_modules/ajv/LICENSE dist/resources/AJV_LICENSE.txt && cp ../../node_modules/ajv-formats/LICENSE dist/resources/AJV_FORMATS_LICENSE.txt && cp ../../node_modules/fast-deep-equal/LICENSE dist/resources/FAST_DEEP_EQUAL_LICENSE.txt && cp ../../node_modules/fast-uri/LICENSE dist/resources/FAST_URI_LICENSE.txt && cp ../../node_modules/json-schema-traverse/LICENSE dist/resources/JSON_SCHEMA_TRAVERSE_LICENSE.txt && cp ../../node_modules/react/LICENSE dist/resources/REACT_LICENSE.txt && cp ../../node_modules/react-dom/LICENSE dist/resources/REACT_DOM_LICENSE.txt && cp ../../node_modules/electron/LICENSE dist/resources/ELECTRON_LICENSE.txt && cp ../../node_modules/electron/dist/LICENSES.chromium.html dist/resources/ELECTRON_CHROMIUM_NOTICES.html && cp ../../scripts/voivox-mcp-launcher.sh dist/resources/voivox-mcp && chmod 755 dist/resources/voivox-mcp && mv dist/resources/index.js dist/resources/voivox-mcp.mjs && (cd ../../native/macos && swift build -c release) && cp ../../native/macos/.build/release/voivox-host ../../native/macos/.build/release/voivox-native-host dist/resources/
scripts.package:mac: npm run build && electron-builder --mac dmg zip --arm64 --publish never

extendInfo.NSAudioCaptureUsageDescription: Voice Vac 需要访问所选应用的音频，以便在本机静音转写。
